title: heteroneuron preslianum
side_effects: Heteroneuron preslianum can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Ingestion of the plant can cause stomach problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, which may lead to dehydration if left untreated. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxins can also cause nerve damage, resulting in numbness, tingling, and muscle weakness. In extreme cases, improper use of Heteroneuron preslianum can lead to anaphylaxis, a life-threatening condition that requires immediate medical attention.
